pydantic_schema.description:
Structured output from LLM after analyzing occupation input.
All fields are constrained to prevent hallucination.

raw_input_normalized.description: Worker's input cleaned and normalized to English. E.g. 'sadak mazdoor' → 'road construction laborer'
raw_input_normalized.title: Raw Input Normalized

occupation_english.description: Clean English occupation name. Max 60 characters.
occupation_english.title: Occupation English

occupation_category.description: Best matching category from the provided list
occupation_category.title: Occupation Category

work_intensity.description: NIOSH work intensity category. SELECT from: light, moderate, heavy, very_heavy.
work_intensity.title: Work Intensity

metabolic_rate_watts_m2.description: Metabolic rate in W/m² body surface area. MUST use exact NIOSH value from the table provided: light=117, moderate=234, heavy=352, very_heavy=468
metabolic_rate_watts_m2.title: Metabolic Rate Watts M2

metabolic_rate_total_watts.description: Total metabolic rate in Watts. MUST use exact NIOSH value: light=180, moderate=300, heavy=415, very_heavy=520
metabolic_rate_total_watts.title: Metabolic Rate Total Watts

clothing_type.description: Most likely clothing for this occupation in India. SELECT from the provided list.
clothing_type.title: Clothing Type

clothing_adjustment_factor.description: CAF in °C. MUST use exact NIOSH value from table provided. summer_work_clothes=0.0, saree_kurta=2.0, construction_helmet_vest=1.0, cotton_coverall=3.5, double_layer_coverall=5.0, synthetic_coverall=0.5, reflective_suit=11.0, full_ppe_no_scba=3.5
clothing_adjustment_factor.title: Clothing Adjustment Factor

typical_outdoor_fraction.description: Fraction of shift spent outdoors (0.0=always indoor, 1.0=always outdoor)
typical_outdoor_fraction.title: Typical Outdoor Fraction

typical_direct_sun_fraction.description: Fraction of outdoor time in direct sun (0.0=always shaded, 1.0=always direct sun)
typical_direct_sun_fraction.title: Typical Direct Sun Fraction

profiling_confidence.description: Your confidence in this profile (0.0–1.0). Be honest. If occupation is ambiguous, score lower.
profiling_confidence.title: Profiling Confidence

ambiguity_flags.description: List any aspects you are unsure about. E.g. ['clothing unclear for this occupation', 'work intensity varies by task']. Empty list if confident.
ambiguity_flags.title: Ambiguity Flags

conservative_fallback_applied.description: Set True if you defaulted to heavier work intensity due to ambiguity (safety-first). Set False if occupation was clear.
conservative_fallback_applied.title: Conservative Fallback Applied

pydantic_schema.title: WorkerProfile
